description_long: This is a compact, handheld vacuum cleaner with a modern, angular design featuring a combination of bright green and matte black plastic components. The main body is cylindrical with a prominent handle at the rear, ergonomically shaped for easy gripping and accented with green highlights. A long, narrow nozzle extends from the front, ideal for reaching tight spaces and corners, and the dust container is integrated into the main body, with visible seams and a latch for removal. The device has a visible trigger or button near the handle for operation, and the branding is clearly displayed on the top surface. The overall construction appears lightweight and portable, suitable for quick cleanups in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or car interiors. No power cord or wheels are visible, suggesting it is likely battery-operated and designed for handheld use.
description: A compact, handheld vacuum cleaner with a green and black color scheme, featuring an ergonomic handle and a long, narrow nozzle. The dust container is integrated into the main body, and branding is visible on the top.
description_view_0: The vacuum cleaner is seen from a rear-side angle, highlighting the ergonomic handle, trigger, and part of the dust container.
description_view_1: A top-down view shows the full length of the nozzle, the branding on the top, and the overall streamlined shape.
description_view_2: A front-facing view emphasizes the circular end of the main body and the straight, narrow nozzle extending outward.
description_view_3: A clear side profile displays the handle, dust container, and the full length of the nozzle, with visible operational details.
attribute_brand_logo: A visible brand logo is present on the top of the main body, featuring white text on a black background.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is integrated into the rear of the device, ergonomically shaped with a green grip area and a trigger positioned for easy thumb or finger access.
